caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a studio or a room within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and a mannequin in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, smiling and looking slightly to his side, possibly interacting with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion, possibly related to business, fashion, or lifestyle topics.
